package.name: semantic_nav_bringup
package.description: Integration/bringup for semantic_nav. Composes the existing BurgerStack stack (sim + SLAM/AMCL + Nav2 + frontier explorer) with the semantic_nav nodes into a two-phase demo: Phase 1 builds a spatial semantic map during exploration; the handoff saves the occupancy + semantic maps; Phase 2 turns natural-language commands into Nav2 goals over the saved maps. Launch/config/rviz only.
